title: [release-1.39] Bump c/image to v5.34.1, c/common v0.62.1, c/buildah v1.39.2
body:
Bump to:

c/image v5.34.1
c/common v0.62.1
c/buildah to v1.39.2

in preparation for the
RHEL 9.6/10.0 ZeroDay and to provide BYOPKI
Certificate Validation.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read and understood our contributing guidelines
(https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) as well as ensuring
that all your commits are signed with `git commit -s`.
-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *TomSweeneyRedHat* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.39/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

You're going to want to cherry-pick https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6012 to fix those conformance tests, and we really should onto older branches as well, because they're going to have the same problem.
@nalind cherry-picked.  I'll go pick it back to others.

> @nalind cherry-picked. I'll go pick it back to others.

Do we still need those for release-1.38 and release-1.35?
@nalind Release 1.38 and 1.35 are off the radar as far as RHEL/OCP is concerned, so currently no need to hit those.
@TomSweeneyRedHat why is this PR listed in the release notes for both 1.39.2 and 1.39.3?
